old_ruins.name: Old Ruins
old_ruins.description: Tumbled stones half-swallowed by the wild — someone built here, once.

wayside_shrine.name: Wayside Shrine
wayside_shrine.description: A weathered roadside shrine to some half-forgotten god.

dark_hollow.name: Dark Hollow
dark_hollow.description: A cave mouth breathing cold, still air.

hermits_rest.name: Hermit's Rest
hermits_rest.description: A lonely camp at the world's edge — someone lives all the way out here.

standing_stones.name: The Standing Stones
standing_stones.description: Grey stones set in a ring, humming faintly under the sky.

sunken_barrow.name: Sunken Barrow
sunken_barrow.description: A grave-mound sunk into the earth, a dark opening at its heart.
